vocab.meaning: lúc tảng sáng/sáng sớm tinh mơ
vocab.example: My father used to wake me up at the crack of dawn for a brisk walk around the lake.

vocab.meaning: khám phá khu vực lân cận
vocab.example: As a curious child, I loved to explore the vicinity of our house on foot every single weekend.

vocab.meaning: nhớ lại một cách sống động/rõ nét
vocab.example: I vividly recollect the scent of damp earth during my childhood walks after a summer rain.

vocab.meaning: đi theo, bám đuôi theo ai đó
vocab.example: I would often tag along with my older brother whenever he went for a stroll in the countryside.
Even at a young age, I was able to reap the benefits of fresh air and physical activity from those daily walks.

vocab.meaning: những con phố nhỏ cổ kính/xinh xắn
vocab.example: We lived in an old town, so walking through the quaint little streets was like stepping back in time.
Being a budding nature enthusiast, I found every walk to be a grand adventure into the wild.
There was a long, scenic stretch of road near my home that was perfect for evening walks.

vocab.meaning: quên mất thời gian/mải mê đến quên cả giờ giấc
vocab.example: My friends and I would often lose track of time while wandering through the meadows near our village.

vocab.meaning: kỷ niệm đáng trân trọng/khắc cốt ghi tâm
vocab.example: Walking hand-in-hand with my grandmother remains a cherished memory of my early years.
